name: YoloLiv YoloBox Pro Portable Encoder Live Streaming
description: Create a live stream production from anywhere with the YoloBox Pro All-in-One Multi-Camera Switching and Live Streaming System from YoloLiv.

features.Key Features:: Simultaneous Cross-Platform Streaming | Encoder, Monitor, Switcher, and Recorder | 8" Touchscreen Control LCD Display | Live Switch from up to 10 Sources | 3 x HDMI & 1 x USB Inputs | Supports H.264/MP4 up to 1080p Video | Stream via Ethernet, Wi-Fi, 4G LTE | 1 x SD Card Slot for Record, up to 128GB | HDCP Compliant, Audio & Mic Input | 400 cd/m² Brightness, Built-In Battery
features.What's In The Bo: YoloLiv YoloBox Pro All-in-One Multi-Camera Switching and Live Streaming System | 2 x USB Type-C Cable | Shoe Mount | SIM Card Eject Pin
